title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston... screen Cancel button
scenario: Device Firmware Update failure handling - turning off headset during update redirects user to device home screen after cancelling
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the mobile device and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
3. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
4. Tap "Update" to begin checking for available firmware updates.
5. Tap "Continue" on the update information screen.
6. Tap "Start Update" to initiate the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process.
7. During the update process (e.g., at 10% progress), trigger a DFU failure by turning off the headset (press and hold the Power button to power off).
8. On the Houston (update progress) screen, tap "Cancel" to abort the update.
expected: User is directed back to the Home screen for the currently connected device.
